sections.paragraph:
(from the root עָלַל I, 3), Psa 14:1 66:5 plur. עֲלִילֹות f. a deed, work-

(1) used of the excellent deeds of God, Psa 9:12 77:13 .

(2) of the deeds of men, especially in a bad sense, Deu 22:14, 17 Deu 22:17(comp. עָלַל I, 2). Zep 3:7, הִשְׁחִיתוּ כֹּל עֲלִילֹותָם “they perverted all their doings,” they acted perversely, wickedly; Psa 14:1 141:4 Eze 14:22.
